summary: A single official in a suit speaks directly to camera against a plain blue studio backdrop with subtitle captions, speaking about voluntary self-deportation, citing roughly 2 million people and the ability to 'target criminals and threats to public safety.' There is no music.
notable_text: Captions: 'And so the Secretary going out and telling the world basically'; 'about 2 million people have elected or have been directed'; 'that we can target criminals and threats to public safety.'
